name: skill-usefulness-audit
tagline: ClawHub (69★): Audit or inventory installed agent-skill packages for cleanup using usage, overlap, burden, risk, and optional ablation/comm
verdict: Well put together overall, clean security and hygiene, with one real gap: it names custom JSON/report fields throughout but never shows a worked example of the actual output, forcing agents to guess the shape. It also skips what happens if Python is missing or unauthenticated.

highlights.summary: Bespoke JSON/report fields (score_breakdown, action_advice, risk_review, action codes) are named throughout but no worked example of the report or JSON shape is shown anywhere in S
Missing/degraded optional evidence files are addressed (lines 126-130), but nothing covers python missing/unauthenticated or the script erroring, despite python being a declared ha
